textByHash.756cf388f534007003ee8d99a37184c0e9d980ff: Oh! Take that horrid thing off your head immediately!
textByHash.3b05dd2c5e429a08a1586ebe4718ead1ed8443fb: You're not going into deeper water with that bowl.
textByHash.00459dec36f24dd05ee165cd0ff529e3ced76a1c: My sister was once trapped in one of those for a long time by your kind. It was awful and she's still terrified of them. We don't allow them beyond this point anymore.
textByHash.66a50f867c085279454b3a3b1d6e5bbe800e0829: Put it on the pile over there.
textByHash.391cade7bc981400c7831617914168bc7b3482a0: Oops. Nevermind. I'm sure you'll manage. Just look for bubbles.
textByHash.82488b8cb5060975a6fe285813411fbfeeeca626: I'm Mairin, one of the many merfolk here.
textByHash.a8f890194822446a8e53b9d2db65905a5dfbb883: Just because you don't see us, doesn't mean we're not there.
textByHash.580cfc5453add49a40da64bd25ccc3e46cc20411: Mostly stop people entering beyond this wreck with those horrid fishbowls.
textByHash.02ebd9b77ea28dcbb42ff7d00403c00004bee73b: Just find some bubbles, or other sources of air.
textByHash.220fe89e579e3272491acd3b93ea618285038550: Yes, some fish can be a good source of air too..
textByHash.f9a730ea24bbb8846da43716555df5b6e0290e45: Yes! You can collect the tears of my poor trapped sister.
textByHash.8f85f1f75f5aeab3a644a6f952ff2c40f4f846f2: She's a mermaid, like me. Didn't you know our tears are the pearls of the sea? You humans.
textByHash.0340bbb3d09177f197a5768117b63b1faa0a5b8b: They usually end up secreted in clams or other places.
textByHash.cd5d89da19323c9e4fc46517063d85968a5d70a5: Well, I have access to a lot of old stuff that's fallen down under the water, so I'm sure I could reward you in some way.
textByHash.24f84c97f5abe81bcb045d69c31af864e60bd26b: If you find any special glistening tears, I can teach you some useful Agility and Thieving techniques too. So will you help me?
